demographic_profile.summary: These are working professionals whose primary responsibility involves observing, recording, and analyzing actual business operations and workflows in real-time. They make purchasing decisions based on tools that help them capture accurate process data, document workflows effectively, and validate operational procedures through direct observation. They are frustrated by theoretical approaches and need practical, field-tested solutions that work in real operational environments.
